description: Plugin-distributed hooks for hospice-referral-sales. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this hospice referral-sales deliverable against the §3 house opinions (the rep educates eligibility — the physician certifies; every value exchange clears anti-kickback first; protect PHI). Set HOSPICE_REFERRAL_SALES_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
